speaker: Andrey
text: Michael, I need you to help Sofia get set up and make sure the OAuth callback issue is fixed before standup. Also prioritize the AskUserQuestions implementation for the action design chat agent.

speaker: Andrey
text: Justin will handle requirements. The demo should focus on retrieval quality and cited answers.

speaker: Sofia
text: Sofia is blocked on setup. We need a better graph trace so reviewers can see why Voltaire found each result.

speaker: Michael
text: The flight search should have fallback data and should never claim it booked anything.

speaker: Andrey
text: We need acceptance tests for the three primary demo queries and a fallback summary for broad questions.
